introSection: Kyrnica Expres is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer D.P.V. Rides currently located at Park Rozrywki Kyrnica Morska in Krynica Morska, Pomorskie, Poland.
fullText: Kyrnica Expres is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer D.P.V. Rides currently located at Park Rozrywki Kyrnica Morska in Krynica Morska, Pomorskie, Poland.
